description:
**Milestone:** Calendar and Todo Sync

Wire existing TodoService and TodoWorkspace to CRDT sync layer. Types and service already landed — this phase adds the CRDT document (doc:todos) and cross-instance permission enforcement. Permission tiers: (1) user lists — user read/write, all Avas read-only. (2) ava-instance lists — writable by owning instance's Ava + user, readable by all Avas on all instances. (3) shared lists — full read/write by anyone. Each Ava auto-creates its own ava-instance list on first activation. Ava-to-Ava coordination happens via the private channel, not by writing to each other's todo lists.

**Files to Modify:**
- libs/crdt/src/documents.ts
- apps/server/src/services/todo-service.ts
- apps/server/src/services/crdt-sync-service.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] doc:todos CRDT document syncs across all instances
- [ ] Permission enforcement: ava-instance lists reject writes from non-owning instances
- [ ] Each instance's Ava auto-creates its own ava-instance list on first activation
- [ ] User can create user-private and shared lists
- [ ] All Avas can read all lists (for situational awareness)
- [ ] Existing TodoService routes and MCP tools work through CRDT layer
- [ ] Real-time updates via CRDT sync (new items appear across instances)
- [ ] Unit tests for permission enforcement across tiers

**Complexity:** large

**Guardrails:** If this phase involves new or changed behavior, include tests that verify correctness. If this phase adds, removes, or changes a user-facing feature, API endpoint, configuration option, or service, update the relevant documentation in `docs/` to reflect those changes.
title: Todo CRDT Sync and Permissions
